framework.name: Computational Efficiency Creates New Application Classes
framework.description: Not just incremental improvement — when AI capabilities cross efficiency thresholds (run locally, real-time, low cost), entirely new application categories emerge that were impossible before. The constraint was never capability but deployment economics.
framework.raw_quote: It uses about 31 percent less computation than state-of-the-art models... enabling HART to run locally on a commercial laptop or smartphone.
